subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This leaf hath been stirred by the breezes of Thy loving-kindness and drawn forth by the melodies of Thy glorious Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذه ورقه حرکتها اریاح عنایتک و اجذبتها نغمات عز احدیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
